docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,075.00 FILED BY KUSTER GERARD AS TO DEFENDANT WEISHAN THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEISHAN THOMAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUSTER GERARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEISHAN THOMAS 665 EDDY ST APT 54 PLT WAIVES COST PLT AMENDED POSSESSION OF PREMISES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED FOR POSSESSION ONLY TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY
CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY JAMES TAYLOR. HEARING DATE SET FOR 4/26/91, 9:00 AM DEPT. 5, ROOM 379.
CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSESSION, CLAIM IS DENIED
EXECUTION RETURNED FULLY SATISFIED AS TO POSSESION ONLY.
